project.name: The Dark Candle
project.purpose: A data-driven voxel game built on Bevy with real-world SI physics, procedural terrain generation, and multi-resolution octree storage. Targets both Linux (Wayland) and Windows.

key_dependencies: bevy 0.18 — ECS game engine (Wayland + X11 on Linux)
serde 1.0 — serialization for all data structs
ron 0.8 — Rusty Object Notation for data files
noise 0.9 — procedural noise (Perlin) for terrain generation
wgpu 27.0 — headless GPU compute (atmosphere renderer, particle simulation)

entry_points: src/main.rs — CLI parsing, plugin registration, Bevy app startup
tests/simulations.rs — headless simulation test harness entry point

major_modules.name: world
major_modules.responsibility: Chunks, octree SVO, terrain generation (flat + spherical), meshing (Surface Nets), erosion (D8 flow), LOD, raycast, voxel access layer, planet config, refinement/subdivision

major_modules.name: physics
major_modules.responsibility: Five physics solvers: LBM gas (D3Q19 wind/pressure/moisture), AMR fluid (Navier-Stokes rivers), FLIP/PIC (particle rain/snow/debris), gravity/buoyancy/drag forces, collision detection. Plus atmosphere model, structural integrity, SI constants

major_modules.name: chemistry
major_modules.responsibility: Heat transfer (Fourier conduction + Stefan-Boltzmann radiation), chemical reactions (RON-defined neighbor-pair matching), state transitions (melt/boil/freeze with latent heat). Fire propagation is emergent from these systems, not a separate module

major_modules.name: lighting
major_modules.responsibility: Orbital sun mechanics, Rayleigh+Mie atmospheric scattering, sunlight propagation/light maps, volumetric cloud ray-marching, terrain shadows, cloud shadows, fog, sky color, day/night cycle

major_modules.name: weather
major_modules.responsibility: Cloud-to-particle precipitation emission, GPU particle readback/rendering, LBM-to-GPU wind field upload, ground accumulation (snow/rain/sand deposits)

major_modules.name: gpu
major_modules.responsibility: Headless wgpu compute: atmosphere renderer (1000x speedup over CPU), particle physics compute (100k particles), GPU context initialization. WGSL shaders in src/gpu/shaders/

major_modules.name: data
major_modules.responsibility: RON asset loading pipeline: MaterialRegistry (sync at startup), plus lazy Bevy asset loading for enemies, creatures, items, props, trees, fluid config. Dual-indexed material lookup by ID and name

major_modules.name: simulation
major_modules.responsibility: Deterministic headless test harness: RON-defined scenarios with composable geometry regions, multi-tick loop (reactions → heat → transitions → pressure), assertion types for physics verification

major_modules.name: procgen
major_modules.responsibility: Procedural generation: recursive tree branching into octree, biome selection/weighted spawning, creature generation, item templates, slope-aware prop decoration, chunk spawn planning

major_modules.name: biology
major_modules.responsibility: Lifecycle (Juvenile→Adult→Elder), Kleiber's law metabolism, health with 6 damage types, corpse decomposition, vegetation spreading. Data structures complete but plugin systems not yet wired

major_modules.name: behavior
major_modules.responsibility: Utility-based AI: needs (hunger/thirst/fatigue/fear), A* pathfinding, line-of-sight/sound/smell perception, behavior execution (idle/wander/chase/eat/attack/sleep). Data structures complete but plugin systems not yet wired

major_modules.name: social
major_modules.responsibility: Factions with territory/disposition, flocking/formations, creature relationships, reputation tracking. FactionRegistry initialized but systems not yet wired

major_modules.name: persistence
major_modules.responsibility: Save/load with 3 manual slots + autosave. Persists player state, RLE-compressed chunks, creatures, items, enemies, factions. SaveId system for stable entity references. Version 3 with migration

major_modules.name: diagnostics
major_modules.responsibility: F3 frame budget overlay (EMA FPS/frame time), F11 ECS state dump (RON), F12 screenshot, per-system timing, video capture (ffmpeg/PNG fallback), software raymarching visualization

major_modules.name: camera
major_modules.responsibility: First-person camera with gravity toggle (G key). Walk 5 m/s, sprint 8 m/s, fly 20 m/s. Tangent-plane movement for spherical terrain. 1.7m eye height, realistic jump physics

major_modules.name: hud
major_modules.responsibility: Health bar (gradient), temperature display (K→°C), 24-hour clock with day/night icons, 8-point compass, fall damage system (7 m/s threshold)

major_modules.name: interaction
major_modules.responsibility: DDA raycast block targeting (6-voxel reach), block break/place, 9-slot hotbar (scroll/number keys), crosshair, block outline highlight

major_modules.name: game_state
major_modules.responsibility: State machine: Loading → Playing ↔ Paused. Loading screen, pause menu with save/load slot UI, virtual time control

major_modules.name: audio
major_modules.responsibility: Material-based footstep sounds (stone/dirt/wood/sand/water), block break/place sounds, looping wind ambient, UI click

major_modules.name: entities
major_modules.responsibility: Basic enemy component and data-driven spawning framework. Minimal — serves as template for entity expansion

patterns: Data-Driven ECS: All game data loaded from .ron files via bevy_common_assets; no hardcoded stats
SI Physics: All physical properties use real-world SI units; emergent behavior only, no magic numbers
1 voxel = 1 meter spatial mapping throughout the engine
Sparse Voxel Octree (SVO): Generic OctreeNode<T> with Morton indexing for multiresolution storage
MaterialRegistry: Synchronous loading at startup with dual-indexed lookup (by ID u16 and by name String)
Async chunk management: AsyncComputeTaskPool for terrain generation and mesh building
Plugin architecture: Each module registers as a Bevy plugin with ordered system sets
Simulation test harness: Declarative RON scenarios with composable geometry and assertion framework
GPU compute via raw wgpu: Atmosphere and particle pipelines bypass Bevy's render graph
RLE compression for chunk persistence; SaveId system for stable cross-session entity references
Surface Nets meshing algorithm (smooth meshes without lookup tables)
Force-based physics: F_net = gravity + buoyancy + drag + friction; acceleration = F_net / mass

features.name: Terrain generation (flat mode)
implements: TerrainGenerator::generate_chunk() — terrain.rs:148 (71 lines, material layering + cave integration)
TerrainGenerator::sample_height() — terrain.rs:99 (Perlin continent + detail noise blending)
TerrainGenerator::is_cave() — terrain.rs:114 (3D Perlin threshold)
features.notes: 2D Perlin heightmap, cave carving via 3D Perlin, deterministic per-chunk

features.name: Terrain generation (spherical mode)
implements: SphericalTerrainGenerator::generate_chunk() — terrain.rs:288 (radial coordinate conversion + surface sampling)
SphericalTerrainGenerator::material_at_radius() — terrain.rs:312 (geological layer lookup)
PlanetConfig::layer_at_radius() — planet.rs:378 (binary search through geological layers)
features.notes: Planet-centered with configurable radius (32km default), geological layers (core→mantle→crust→soil)

features.name: Hydraulic erosion / valley carving
implements: fill_sinks() — erosion.rs:424 (50 lines, priority-flood Planchon & Darboux)
compute_d8_directions() — erosion.rs:481 (32 lines, steepest descent with diagonal √2)
compute_flow_accumulation() — erosion.rs:518 (descending-height traversal)
carve_valley() — erosion.rs:583 (32 lines, V/U profile blending, material overrides)
features.notes: Flat mode only. Depth ∝ ln(flow), width ∝ √flow

features.name: Octree / multiresolution voxel storage
implements: OctreeNode<T> enum — octree.rs:22 (Leaf(T) | Branch(Box<[OctreeNode<T>; 8]>))
analyze_chunk() — refinement.rs:115 (delegates to analyze_voxels(), 80+ lines)
build_refined_octree() — refinement.rs:219 (54 lines, pins candidates, collapses non-critical)
FlatVoxelStorage / OctreeVoxelStorage — voxel_access.rs (unified VoxelAccess trait)
features.notes: Generic SVO with Morton indexing, adaptive subdivision on surface/material/thermal/pressure gradients

features.name: Async chunk meshing (Surface Nets)
implements: generate_chunk_mesh() — meshing.rs:641 (28 lines, dispatches to octree or flat variant)
dispatch_mesh_tasks() — meshing.rs:678 (88 lines, AsyncComputeTaskPool with LOD hysteresis)
collect_mesh_results() — meshing.rs:766 (57 lines, polls async results, updates Bevy mesh assets)
features.notes: Surface Nets algorithm, max 8 dispatches/frame, incandescence glow, LOD transitions

features.name: LOD system
implements: chunk_lod_level() — lod.rs:266 (delegates to config.level_for_distance())
summarize_voxels() — lod.rs:288 (65+ lines, dominant material, surface presence, color avg)
features.notes: Distance + screen-space error based with hysteresis (12% default). LodSummary per chunk

features.name: LBM gas simulation
implements: lbm_step() — lbm_gas/step.rs:27 (49 lines, buoyancy/Coriolis → BGK collision → Smagorinsky → streaming)
equilibrium() — lbm_gas/lattice.rs:106 (10 lines, D3Q19 Maxwell-Boltzmann equilibrium)
LbmGasPlugin — lbm_gas/plugin.rs:104 (registers systems)
features.notes: D3Q19 lattice-Boltzmann: wind, pressure, convection, moisture. Phase change (rain/snow). Octree bridge

features.name: AMR fluid simulation
implements: fluid_step() — amr_fluid/step.rs:26 (38 lines, surface classify → advection → diffusion → projection)
project() — amr_fluid/pressure.rs:22 (Poisson pressure solver)
AmrFluidPlugin — amr_fluid/plugin.rs:69 (registers systems)
features.notes: Incompressible Navier-Stokes: semi-Lagrangian advection, implicit diffusion, pressure projection. River injection

features.name: FLIP/PIC particle simulation
implements: flip_step() — flip_pic/step.rs:42 (67 lines, emission → P2G → pressure → G2P → advect → accumulate)
scatter_to_grid() — flip_pic/p2g.rs:9 (55+ lines, trilinear scatter with mass weighting)
gather_from_grid() — flip_pic/g2p.rs:19 (24 lines, 97% FLIP / 3% PIC blend)
FlipPicPlugin — flip_pic/plugin.rs:39 (registers systems)
features.notes: Hybrid particle-grid: rain/snow/spray/ash/sand. Ground accumulation. Octree bridge

features.name: Gravity / buoyancy / drag forces
implements: gravitational_force() — gravity.rs:70 (mass × GRAVITY)
buoyancy_force() — gravity.rs:76 (ρ × V × g)
drag_force() — gravity.rs:82 (0.5 × ρ × v² × Cd × A)
apply_forces() — gravity.rs:164 (95+ lines, flat/spherical gravity, terminal velocity, ground friction)
features.notes: Force-model integration: emergent terminal velocity. PhysicsBody struct with mass and drag profile

features.name: Collision detection
implements: aabb_intersects_terrain() — collision.rs:46 (41 lines, voxel-space AABB query)
SpatialGrid::potential_pairs() — broad_phase.rs:78 (18 lines, hash-grid deduplication)
ground_height_at() / ground_height_radial() — world/collision.rs (surface queries)
features.notes: AABB vs terrain/octree, broadphase spatial grid, ground height queries (flat + radial)

features.name: Structural integrity
implements: find_unsupported() — integrity.rs:48 (57 lines, BFS flood-fill from anchors)
collapse_unsupported() — integrity.rs:111 (22 lines, drops voxels into air below)
features.notes: Unsupported voxel detection and gravity-driven collapse (sand-like stacking)

features.name: Atmosphere model
implements: temperature_at_altitude() — atmosphere.rs:200 (7 lines, troposphere lapse rate + stratosphere constant)
pressure_at_altitude_full() — constants.rs:142 (barometric formula: P₀ × exp(−Mgh/RT))
air_density() — constants.rs:227 (ideal gas law: ρ = PM/(RT))
features.notes: ISA model. No single density_at_altitude() function — density derived via ideal gas law from pressure and temperature

features.name: Heat transfer (conduction + radiation)
implements: diffuse_temperature() — heat.rs:67 (27 lines, Fourier's law with harmonic mean conductivity)
diffuse_chunk() — heat.rs:107 (CFL-safe adaptive sub-stepping: dt_stable = dx²/(6·α_max) × 0.9)
radiate_chunk() — heat.rs:302 (100+ lines, 26-direction ray-cast with Stefan-Boltzmann exchange)
stefan_boltzmann_flux() — heat.rs:231 (ε·σ·T⁴)
voxel_view_factor() — heat.rs:253 (A/(π·d²) capped)
effective_emissivity() — heat.rs:242 (gray-body: 1/(1/ε₁ + 1/ε₂ − 1))
features.notes: dx-aware for multiresolution. Radiation uses line-of-sight ray marching with absorption coefficients

features.name: Chemical reactions
implements: check_reaction() — reactions.rs:59 (30 lines, material match + temperature range + neighbor requirement)
ReactionData struct — reactions.rs:17 (name, input_a/b, min/max_temperature, output_a/b, heat_output)
load_reaction_rules() — runtime.rs (loads .reaction.ron files)
features.notes: 8 reaction definitions (combustion variants, pyrolysis, oxyhydrogen). RON-defined neighbor-pair matching

features.name: State transitions (phase change)
implements: check_transition() — state_transitions.rs:30 (46 lines, solid↔liquid↔gas vs melting/boiling points)
apply_transitions() — state_transitions.rs:191 (54 lines, latent heat accumulation model)
latent_heat_for_transition() — state_transitions.rs:81
drain_latent_buffer() — state_transitions.rs:132
features.notes: Handles bidirectional transitions with cumulative latent-heat absorption before phase change completes

features.name: Fire propagation
implements: Emergent from: diffuse_chunk() (heat spreads to adjacent wood) + check_reaction() (ignition above threshold) + apply_transitions() (charcoal/ash products)
fire_propagation.rs is TEST CODE ONLY (#[test] functions verifying the emergent behavior)
features.notes: No dedicated fire system — fire is emergent from heat diffusion + reaction matching + state transitions. Verified by integration tests in fire_propagation.rs

features.name: Orbital sun / day-night cycle
implements: compute_sun_direction() — orbital.rs:70 (51 lines, axial tilt + libration + daily rotation matrix)
advance_orbital_state() — orbital.rs:44 (14 lines, rotation_rate = TAU/day_length)
OrbitalState struct — orbital.rs:18 (rotation_angle, orbital_angle, time_scale, year_in_days)
time_of_day_from_rotation() — orbital.rs:127 (rotation angle → hours 0..24)
time_acceleration_input() — orbital.rs:138 (30 lines, [/]/\/P keybinds)
features.notes: 72× default time scale. Sun direction in planet body frame

features.name: Atmospheric scattering
implements: sky_color() — scattering.rs:263 (100+ lines, 16-sample ray-march with Rayleigh+Mie in-scattering)
rayleigh_phase() — scattering.rs:132 ((3/16π)(1+cos²θ))
mie_phase() — scattering.rs:149 (Henyey-Greenstein forward-biased)
optical_depth() — scattering.rs:208 (40 lines, numerical integration along ray)
compute_scattering_params() — scattering.rs:88 (33 lines, λ⁻⁴ RGB Rayleigh coefficients)
features.notes: First-principles ray-marching. Beer-Lambert extinction. Tone-mapping to sRGB

features.name: Volumetric clouds
implements: sample_cloud_density() — clouds.rs:81 (55 lines, trilinear interpolation across voxel cube)
march_cloud_ray() — clouds.rs:169 (74 lines, Beer-Lambert + Henyey-Greenstein, early-exit at transmittance < 0.01)
henyey_greenstein_phase() — clouds.rs:147
composite_cloud_over_sky() — clouds.rs:252
estimate_cloud_coverage() — clouds.rs:271
features.notes: Volumetric density sampling with chunk-boundary handling. Standard-over compositing

features.name: Shadows and fog
implements: compute_terrain_shadows() — shadows.rs:456 (44 lines, cone-sampled ray-cast from surface toward sun)
fog_transmittance() — shadows.rs:247 (73 lines, 1m-step numerical integration, height-exponential + humidity + cold-pooling)
cloud_shadow_factor() — shadows.rs:90 (63 lines, ray-march toward sun through cloud field, Beer-Lambert τ)
fog_density() — shadows.rs:208 (height/humidity/cold-pooling factors)
compute_shadow_map() — shadows.rs:167 (pre-computes horizontal surface shadow)
features.notes: Soft terrain shadows via cone sampling. Distance fog with altitude-dependent density

features.name: Sunlight / light maps
implements: propagate_sunlight() — light_map.rs:143 (42 lines, top-down column propagation with Beer-Lambert attenuation)
apply_light_map() — light_map.rs:201 (10 lines, modulates vertex colors by light level × shadow factor)
ChunkLightMap struct — light_map.rs:25 (per-voxel RGB [u8;3] + shadow f32)
propagate_sunlight_from_registry() — light_map.rs:187 (wrapper using material registry for absorption)
features.notes: Opaque materials block all light; transparent materials attenuate via exp(−α·1m) per voxel

features.name: Weather particle system
implements: scan_clouds_for_precipitation() — emitter.rs:182 (wraps pure function, registered as system)
extract_wind_field() — wind_upload.rs:118 (LBM→GPU wind transfer)
track_ground_impacts() — accumulation.rs:95 (42 lines, reads particle readback, updates per-column accumulation)
apply_accumulation() — accumulation.rs:140 (50+ lines, converts accumulated snow/water into voxel materials)
WeatherPlugin — mod.rs:20 (registers FixedUpdate + Update systems via .chain())
features.notes: Plugin is NOT a stub — registers ParticleRenderPlugin, wind extraction, and accumulation chain

features.name: GPU atmosphere renderer
implements: GpuRenderer::render_frame() — renderer.rs:358 (192 lines, constructs GPU structs, creates bind groups, dispatches compute, reads back RgbImage)
Compute dispatch — renderer.rs:520-541 (pass.dispatch_workgroups(wg_x, wg_y, 1))
WGSL shader — src/gpu/shaders/atmosphere_render.wgsl (confirmed present)
features.notes: Headless wgpu compute. Bypasses Bevy render graph. 1000× speedup over CPU path

features.name: GPU particle compute
implements: GpuParticle struct — particles.rs:31 (14 fields, 64 bytes, matches WGSL layout)
ParticleCompute::new() — particles.rs:80+ (creates pipeline from particle_step.wgsl)
WGSL shader — src/gpu/shaders/particle_step.wgsl (confirmed present)
features.notes: Gravity, drag, wind on GPU. Rain/snow/sand/hail types with SI parameters. 256 threads/workgroup, 100k max

features.name: Material data pipeline
implements: load_material_registry() — mod.rs:432 (23 lines, reads assets/data/materials/, parses RON, builds registry)
MaterialRegistry struct — mod.rs (get(), get_by_name(), resolve_name() — dual-indexed by u16 ID and String name)

MaterialData struct — mod.rs:73 (100+ lines, density, thermal_conductivity, specific_heat_capacity, latent_heat_fusion/vaporization, hardness, viscosity, heat_of_combustion, molar_mass, refractive_index, reflectivity, rgb absorption, albedo, phase transition targets)
features.notes: 20 materials with full SI properties. Sync-loaded at startup in DataPlugin::build()

features.name: Procedural tree generation
implements: generate_tree() — tree.rs:144 (45+ lines, recursive branching into octree, rasterises segments)
stamp_tree_into_chunk() — tree.rs:434 (56 lines, generates at base resolution, maps to chunk space)
TreeRegistry struct — tree.rs:494 (get/insert/len/is_empty)
features.notes: Bark shell → wood core → twigs → leaves. Stamped into chunks via biome system

features.name: Biome system
implements: select_biome() — biomes.rs:94 (10 lines, matches by height/temperature/moisture ranges)
BiomeData struct — biomes.rs:34 (name, ranges, surface_material, creature/item/prop/tree spawns)
BiomePlugin — biomes.rs:13 (registers RonAssetPlugin::<BiomeData>)

features.name: Prop / decoration system
implements: generate_prop() — props.rs:60 (16 lines, applies scale variation from template + seed)
decorate_chunks() — props.rs:164 (70+ lines, biome query → spawn planning → surface placement)
PropRegistry struct — props.rs:37 (get/insert/len/is_empty)

features.name: Creature generation
implements: generate_creature() — creatures.rs:61 (30 lines, stat variation via RNG on health/speed/attack/color)
plan_chunk_spawns() — spawning.rs:62 (30+ lines, iterates biome creature_spawns, calculates counts/positions)
features.notes: 4 creature types (cave_spider, deer, rabbit, wolf). Template-based with biome-aware spawn planning

features.name: Item generation
implements: generate_item() — items.rs:55 (40 lines, material modifiers on weight/durability/damage/armor)
features.notes: 4 item types (apple, pickaxe, sword, wooden_shield). Categories: Tool, Weapon, Armor, Food, etc.

features.name: First-person camera
implements: camera_move() — mod.rs:208 (70+ lines, WASD + tangent-plane projection for spherical + jump + fly mode)
camera_look() — mod.rs:174 (27 lines, mouse accumulation → yaw/pitch → quaternion rotation)
camera_gravity() — mod.rs:314 (64 lines, radial/Y-axis gravity + ground collision)
CameraPlugin — mod.rs:15 (registers Startup spawn_camera + Update chain: look → move → gravity + cursor grab/release)

features.name: HUD
implements: update_health_bar() — hud.rs:177 (23 lines, fill width + green→yellow→red gradient)
update_temperature() — hud.rs:214 (45 lines, K→°C + blue/white/red color coding)
update_compass() — hud.rs:289 (24 lines, yaw → 8-point cardinal direction)
HudPlugin — hud.rs:21 (registers OnEnter/Exit spawn/despawn + Update systems for all 5 HUD elements)

features.name: Block interaction
implements: world_raycast() — interaction.rs:66 (110+ lines, DDA ray marching with chunk lookup + face normal)
break_block() — interaction.rs:223 (50 lines, hold time tracking, breaks after 0.3s threshold)
place_block() — interaction.rs:276 (35+ lines, right-click on adjacent face, player collision prevention)

GameStatePlugin — game_state.rs:27 (registers OnEnter/Exit for all 3 states: loading screen, playing entry, pause menu + Update systems for loading check, pause toggle)

implements: save_game() — save.rs:82 (250+ lines, serializes player + terrain + chunks + creatures + items + enemies + factions)
load_game() — load.rs:101 (280+ lines, deserializes + version migration + entity respawn with SaveId mapping)
encode_rle() — types.rs:136 (22 lines, run-length encodes voxels)
decode_rle() — types.rs:161 (17 lines, expands RLE runs)
SaveId struct + SaveIdCounter resource — types.rs / mod.rs (stable u64 entity identifiers)

implements: footstep_system() — audio.rs:119 (60 lines, material-based sound selection on interval)
AudioPlugin — audio.rs:17 (registers Startup load_audio_assets + OnEnter/Exit ambient + Update footstep/block_sound systems)

implements: ecs_dump_system() — mod.rs:106 (140+ lines, captures camera + chunk stats, writes RON on F11)
screenshot_system() — mod.rs:260 (captures PNG on F12)
update_frame_budget() — frame_budget.rs (EMA-based FPS/frame time)
DiagnosticsPlugin — mod.rs:36 (registers Update systems for F3 overlay, F11 dump, F12 screenshot, frame budget, system timings)

features.name: Simulation test framework
implements: simulate_tick() — mod.rs:174 (wraps simulate_tick_dx with dx=1.0)
simulate_tick_dx() — mod.rs:188 (350+ lines: reactions → heat diffusion → radiation → transitions → pressure)
run_scenario() — scenario.rs:394 (285+ lines: build registry → create grid → apply regions → run loop → evaluate assertions)
Assertion enum — assertions.rs:22 (MaterialCountEq/Gt/Lt, MaterialAbsent, RegionAvgTempGt/Lt, VoxelTempGt, RegionAvgPressureGt, MaxTempGt, TotalReactionsGt, NoReactions)
Assertion::evaluate() — assertions.rs:115 (125+ lines, matches each variant against final grid)
features.notes: 6 simulation scenarios. 9 geometry types via Region enum. Deterministic multi-tick harness

features.name: Biology system (lifecycle, metabolism, health)
implements: Data structs and helpers exist (~1,212 LOC) but BiologyPlugin::build() registers NO ECS systems
features.notes: Growth stages, Kleiber metabolism, 6 damage types, decomposition, vegetation spreading — all as standalone functions, none wired into the ECS update loop

features.name: Behavior AI (utility-based)
implements: Data structs and helpers exist (~1,786 LOC) but BehaviorPlugin::build() registers NO ECS systems
features.notes: Needs, A* pathfinding, perception, behavior execution — all as standalone functions, none wired into the ECS update loop

features.name: Social system (factions, relationships)
implements: SocialPlugin initializes FactionRegistry resource only — NO active systems registered
features.notes: Factions, flocking, relationships, reputation — data structures only. ~1,387 LOC not wired into ECS

features.name: Entity spawning framework
implements: Enemy component (speed field), asset loading for goblin. Minimal template only
features.notes: Data-driven framework in place but no substantive creature spawning logic

features.name: Scene presets
implements: ScenePreset::from_name() — scene_presets.rs (case-insensitive, underscore/hyphen interchangeable)
Only ValleyRiver preset exists
features.notes: Expandable pattern via --scene CLI arg, but only 1 preset defined

features.name: Spherical terrain persistence
features.notes: Save/load only supports flat mode. Spherical save/load not yet implemented

tech_debt.description: TODO: Sample voxel at entity position to determine medium density for buoyancy

TODO: Replace simulation dx with native octree LOD-based dynamic resolution when available
Biology, Behavior, and Social plugins have complete data structures (~4,385 LOC) but no ECS systems are wired into their plugin build() methods

Only one scene preset (ValleyRiver) exists — expandable pattern but minimal content

required_vars: CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR — automatically set by Cargo; used at compile-time (env!) and runtime (std::env::var) for asset path resolution
setup_commands: Install lld linker for fast compile times on Linux
environment.test_command: cargo test --lib (fast, 1147+ tests) OR cargo test (all including integration) OR cargo test --test simulations (simulation scenarios only)
environment.build_command: cargo run --features bevy/dynamic_linking (dev) OR cargo run --release (perf) OR cargo build --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --release (Windows cross-compile)

conventions.naming: RFC 430: snake_case functions/variables, PascalCase types. Named MaterialId constants (never numeric literals). Kebab-case for .ron file names
conventions.file_structure: One Bevy plugin per module directory with mod.rs. Data structs derive serde::Deserialize + bevy::asset::Asset + TypePath. All .ron data files in assets/data/ with descriptive suffixes (.material.ron, .reaction.ron, .biome.ron, etc.)
other: Lines under 100 characters; rustfmt enforced; clippy warnings treated as errors (-D warnings)
No unwrap()/expect() in library code — use Result with ? operator
Prefer &T over cloning; use &str for function parameters; iterators over index-based loops
All physics use real-world SI units — no arbitrary constants or magic numbers
Eagerly implement Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, From, AsRef on types
/// rustdoc comments for all public APIs with examples
Unit tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests alongside code
Pre-commit hook: cargo fmt --check → cargo clippy -D warnings → cargo test --lib

meta.verification_method: Each 'complete' feature verified by locating specific implementing function(s) with file paths and line numbers. Plugin::build() methods confirmed to register actual systems (not stubs). WGSL shader files confirmed present.
uncertain_areas: Line numbers are approximate — may drift with future edits
WGSL shader internals not audited (only confirmed files exist and are referenced by Rust dispatch code)
Biology/Behavior/Social modules have extensive standalone functions but no runtime verification since ECS systems are not wired
